# Widget Hosting Configuration

## 🌐 GitHub Pages Hosting

Your widget is now hosted on GitHub Pages:
**URL**: `https://codeless-tcr.github.io/vvai/widget.js`

## 📋 Embed Code Format

When you create a new tenant in the admin dashboard, you'll get this embed code:

```html
<script>
window.VOICE_AGENT_TENANT_ID = "your-tenant-uuid";
window.VOICE_AGENT_SIGNATURE = "your-signature-hash";
window.VOICE_AGENT_API_URL = "http://localhost:8000/api";
</script>
<script src="https://codeless-tcr.github.io/vvai/widget.js"></script>
```

## 🔧 Configuration Variables

### Required (Auto-generated by admin dashboard):
- **VOICE_AGENT_TENANT_ID**: Unique tenant identifier
- **VOICE_AGENT_SIGNATURE**: HMAC security signature for authentication

### Optional (Customizable):
- **VOICE_AGENT_API_URL**: Your backend API endpoint
  - Development: `http://localhost:8000/api`
  - Production: `https://your-domain.com/api`

## 🚀 Production Deployment

### Step 1: Update API URL for Production
When deploying to production, clients should update the API URL:

```html
<script>
window.VOICE_AGENT_TENANT_ID = "your-tenant-uuid";
window.VOICE_AGENT_SIGNATURE = "your-signature-hash";
window.VOICE_AGENT_API_URL = "https://api.yourcompany.com/api";
</script>
<script src="https://codeless-tcr.github.io/vvai/widget.js"></script>
```

### Step 2: Deploy Backend to Cloud
- AWS: ECS/Fargate + RDS PostgreSQL
- GCP: Cloud Run + Cloud SQL
- Azure: Container Instances + Azure Database

### Step 3: Configure CORS
Update backend CORS to allow client domains:
```python
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["https://client1.com", "https://client2.com"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)
```

## 🔒 Security Features

1. **Tenant Isolation**: Each tenant has unique ID and signature
2. **HMAC Verification**: Backend validates signature on every request
3. **Domain Validation**: Backend checks request origin against tenant's registered domain
4. **Encrypted API Keys**: OpenAI keys stored encrypted in database

## 📝 Widget Features Controlled by Backend

The widget automatically fetches these from your backend:
- ✅ Avatar image
- ✅ Company name
- ✅ Voice model (alloy, echo, onyx, nova, shimmer, fable)
- ✅ Brand colors
- ✅ Introduction script
- ✅ Knowledge base responses

## 🎨 Customization Flow

```
Admin Dashboard (localhost:3000)
    ↓
Update tenant config
    ↓
Saved to PostgreSQL database
    ↓
Widget fetches config via /api/config
    ↓
Displays to end user
```

## 🧪 Testing

1. Create tenant in admin dashboard: `http://localhost:3000`
2. Copy generated embed code
3. Create test HTML file:
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head><title>Widget Test</title></head>
<body>
    <h1>My Website</h1>
    
    <!-- Paste embed code here -->
    <script>
    window.VOICE_AGENT_TENANT_ID = "your-tenant-uuid";
    window.VOICE_AGENT_SIGNATURE = "your-signature-hash";
    window.VOICE_AGENT_API_URL = "http://localhost:8000/api";
    </script>
    <script src="https://codeless-tcr.github.io/vvai/widget.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```
4. Open in browser and test voice interaction

## 📊 Current Setup

- **Backend API**: http://localhost:8000
- **Admin Dashboard**: http://localhost:3000
- **Widget Host**: https://codeless-tcr.github.io/vvai/widget.js
- **Database**: PostgreSQL (localhost:5432)

## 🔄 Updating Widget

To update the widget for all clients:
1. Modify `widget/voice-agent-widget.js`
2. Commit and push to GitHub
3. GitHub Pages automatically updates
4. All client websites get the new version (no re-embedding needed)

## ⚠️ Important Notes

- Widget file is cached by browsers (may take 5-10 minutes to update)
- Always test changes in incognito/private browsing mode
- Keep widget.js lightweight (currently ~5KB)
- HTTPS required for microphone access in production
